channels.name: WhatsApp
channels.transport: WhatsApp Cloud API for direct sends plus Humungousaur QR bridge contract for personal accounts

steps: Choose the official Cloud API path for production sends, or pair a local QR bridge for personal-account experimentation.
For Cloud API, set WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN and WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID in the workspace environment.
Use the recipient phone number as conversation_id for direct sends.
Keep group or QR bridge delivery in prepared-outbox mode until a trusted local bridge is connected.
notes: This catalog describes Humungousaur-owned setup and adapter contracts.
Cloud API delivery is implemented for text; personal QR bridge delivery is represented by audited outbox envelopes.
Important primary personal channel.
Use audited outbox when no trusted account runtime is configured.

channels.name: Slack
channels.transport: Slack Web API, Socket Mode, or Events HTTP webhook

steps: Create a Slack app with bot permissions for chat:write and the read scopes needed by the rooms you enable.
Set SLACK_BOT_TOKEN in the workspace environment for outbound sends.
Use SLACK_APP_TOKEN for Socket Mode inbound or SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET for HTTP inbound verification.
Use Slack channel IDs such as C123, G123, D123, or MPIM ids as conversation_id.
notes: MPIM conversations are treated as group chats for policy, mention, and ambient-room rules.
Best work-channel target for teams, rooms, MPIMs, files, reactions, and native approval controls.

channels.name: Telegram
channels.transport: Telegram Bot API long polling or webhook

steps: Create a bot with BotFather and set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.
For groups, collect both the group chat id and the human sender ids you allow.
Disable BotFather privacy mode or make the bot an admin when ambient group messages should be visible.
Use numeric chat ids, including negative supergroup ids, as conversation_id.
notes: Markdown image syntax can be split into media references during outbound preparation.
Fastest bot-token onboarding path.
Group topics use thread-aware conversation ids when the runtime provides them.

channels.name: Discord

steps: Create a Discord application and bot.
Enable message content intent when guild messages should be processed.
Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN in the workspace environment.
Use a channel id, thread id, or DM channel id as conversation_id.
notes: Bot-authored messages stay blocked unless explicitly allowed and loop-protected.
Strong community and private-server assistant surface.
Supports bot-loop protection and quiet ambient rooms.

channels.name: Signal

steps: Install signal-cli.
Register or link the Signal account.
Use phone number or group id as conversation_id.
notes: Outbound direct send is prepared until a trusted local CLI bridge is enabled.
Privacy-focused local bridge surface.

channels.name: Google Chat

steps: Create or configure a Google Chat app webhook.
Set GOOGLE_CHAT_WEBHOOK_URL.
Use the configured space as conversation_id for audit continuity.
notes: Webhook sends use the configured webhook URL rather than a per-message target URL.
Useful enterprise room surface when Slack is unavailable.

channels.name: Microsoft Teams
channels.transport: Bot Framework or Teams incoming webhook

steps: For simple sends, configure a Teams webhook URL.
For full inbound/outbound bot behavior, configure Bot Framework app credentials.
Use the channel or conversation id as conversation_id.
notes: Webhook text delivery is implemented; full Bot Framework listener is a trusted runtime contract.
Enterprise collaboration surface.

channels.name: SMS
channels.transport: Twilio SMS REST API and webhook

steps: Set Twilio credentials and sending number in the workspace environment.
Use the E.164 recipient phone number as conversation_id.
Keep allowlists strict because SMS has no app-level identity proof.
notes: SMS delivery is concise and should avoid long or secret-bearing messages.
Useful for urgent low-bandwidth notifications.

channels.name: WebChat
channels.transport: Humungousaur Gateway WebSocket and local app chat

steps: Start the Humungousaur API.
Use the Windows app or WebChat client as the conversation surface.
notes: This is the native local UI channel.
First-party app surface for onboarding and daily assistant interaction.

channels.name: Voice Call
channels.transport: Twilio or Plivo telephony plus STT/TTS providers

steps: Configure telephony credentials.
Configure Deepgram or another STT provider.
Configure ElevenLabs or Windows speech for TTS.
Route call transcripts into the interaction harness as voice stimuli.
notes: Voice calls share the same harness decision path as wake-word and transcript stimuli.
Human-like phone interface path for the same agent.

channels.name: Matrix

steps: Create a Matrix bot account.
Set homeserver URL and access token.
Use room id as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are implemented; direct Matrix send is a next adapter target.
Open protocol group-room surface.

channels.name: iMessage
channels.transport: macOS Messages bridge or remote Mac relay

steps: Run on a signed-in Mac or configure a relay Mac.
Grant Messages and automation permissions.
Use chat guid or phone/email handle as conversation_id.
notes: Windows host requires a remote signed-in Mac bridge.
Host-specific personal messaging path.

channels.name: Feishu/Lark

steps: Create a Feishu/Lark bot.
Set app id and app secret.
Use chat id as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Lark/Feishu business chat surface.

channels.name: LINE

steps: Create a LINE bot channel.
Set LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN.
Use user, group, or room id as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Consumer messenger channel.

channels.name: Mattermost

steps: Create a Mattermost bot token.
Set base URL and bot token.
Use channel id as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Self-hosted team chat target.

channels.name: Nextcloud Talk

steps: Create a Nextcloud app password.
Set base URL, username, and app password.
Use room token as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Self-hosted collaboration channel.

channels.name: IRC

steps: Set IRC server and nick.
Set password if required.
Use #channel or nick as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Classic low-friction chat surface.

channels.name: Twitch

steps: Create a Twitch bot token.
Set bot username and token.
Use channel name as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Live stream chat surface.

channels.name: WeChat

steps: Configure a compliant WeChat bot or a trusted local QR bridge.
Use contact id as conversation_id.
Keep sends in prepared outbox until the account bridge is trusted.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Region-specific personal messaging surface.

channels.name: QQ Bot

steps: Configure QQ bot credentials.
Use private or group chat id as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
QQ rich media channel contract.

channels.name: Zalo

steps: Configure Zalo bot credentials.
Use user or group id as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Vietnam messaging channel.

channels.name: Zalo Personal

steps: Pair a trusted local Zalo personal bridge.
Use contact id as conversation_id.
Keep delivery in outbox mode until bridge trust is configured.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Personal account Zalo surface.

channels.name: Nostr

steps: Set Nostr private key and relay list.
Use recipient pubkey as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Decentralized direct-message surface.

channels.name: Tlon

steps: Configure ship URL and access code.
Use channel or DM id as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Urbit messenger surface.

channels.name: Synology Chat
channels.transport: Synology Chat incoming and outgoing webhooks

steps: Create a Synology Chat webhook.
Set SYNOLOGY_CHAT_WEBHOOK_URL.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
NAS-hosted chat surface.

channels.name: ClickClack
channels.transport: ClickClack local or hosted chat bridge

steps: Configure a trusted ClickClack bridge URL and token.
Use room, group, or contact id as conversation_id.
Keep sends approval-gated until bridge ownership is verified.
notes: Prepared outbox, policy, pairing, and troubleshooting contract are available.
native ClickClack bridge surface.

channels.name: QA Channel

steps: Use qa_channel in tests and smoke runs for deterministic channel behavior.
Use any stable fixture id as conversation_id.
notes: No network, account, or credential is required.
Deterministic native channel harness for tests, docs, and smoke runs.

channels.name: Yuanbao

steps: Configure a trusted Yuanbao bridge.
Use conversation id from the bridge as conversation_id.
notes: Prepared outbox and policy contract are available.
Tencent assistant messaging bridge contract.
